programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Widow Sebrina, 56, says she’s in love with her overseas boyfriend, “James,” but they've never met. She sent him more than $250,000, emptying her life savings, with payback when they marry. Is she a catfish victim? Dr. Phil confronts “James” on the phone!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From curing rare forms of cancer to foreseeing mass destruction, to freeing others from sickness and sin, Julia believes she is "God's chosen prophet". Parents, Mark and Cheryll, worry their daughter is mentally ill with deep concern for the grandkids.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Warren Jeffs, leader of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints & self-proclaimed prophet, was on the FBI's 10 Most Wanted Fugitives for unlawful flight & sexual conduct with a minor. Dr. Phil talks with FLDS member Willie Jessop.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Inside the “California House of Horrors” where 13 children were starved, chained and abused by their own parents. Family, neighbors and childhood friends speak about the tragedy. Cleveland kidnap survivor Michelle Knight sends a message to the children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is it wrong to go dating for dollars? Dr. Phil's guests say if you want to court them, you have to pay to play! Two self-proclaimed gold diggers share their tips for getting loot, and a woman wonders if it's wrong to be attracted to wealthy men.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tracey says her 23-year marriage is falling apart because husband Doug is having an affair with transgender female Essence. Tracey wants Doug to choose once and for all so that she can move on with her life. Why is she leaving the decision to him?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tensions run high in this father/daughter battle conclusion. McKinley, 18, confronts her dad for allegedly being "abusive" in her childhood & a "pedophile," claims he denies. Dr. Phil questions Cory on an incident leading to Cory's sexual battery arrest.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's a tale of torture that shocked America and Dr. Phil speaks exclusively to one woman who lived to tell it. The first of three women abducted by Ariel Castro, Michelle Knight, recounts her story inside Cleveland’s now notorious House of Horrors. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil welcomes controversial YouTuber "Agent Sebastian" who runs a page called "Cart Narcs" posting hundreds of explosive videos apprehending shoppers in parking lots who do not return their carts to the corrals. Is "Agent Sebastian" breaking the law?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha launched a YouTube channel, "Truthfully Trisha". She says she deals with her family's disapproval and also her online "haters". Husband, Sean, says he's fed up with his wife's streaming. Can Dr. Phil help Trisha disconnect to focus on family? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a beautiful mother of two, vanished in 2009. Her husband, Josh, was considered a person of interest & what began as an unsolved mystery tragically ended with the murder-suicide of Josh Powell & their two sons, Charles, 7, & Braden, 5.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Baylen bravely posted TikTok videos of her daily struggles with Tourette syndrome and now has over 3 million followers. Singer/Influencer Lele Pons says she also suffers from OCD, Tourette syndrome, & depression. They discuss their experiences.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In one of the most twisted & bizarre love deceptions ever on Dr. Phil, 7 female college students from Brigham Young University face the man they say they fell in love with online but never met in person. Don't miss the surprising twist in this story!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale is unhappy with Dr. Clyburn's treatment of his cold the Clampetts hear about it. Granny decides it's time to set up practice and enlists the rest of her family to help. She also claims a cure for the common cold.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The world's richest woman wants to buy the Clampett mansion and will stop at nothing to get it. Will Jed finally sell?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Granny hears the Drysdales are at a horse show, she declares she wants good trotter so she can ride it to the market. When Mr. Drysdale buys a racer along with a buggy, Granny decides she wants to be the driver at the track.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters an ostrich at the Drysdales and believe it's a giant chicken. She decides it got into her "medicinal tonic" and that's why it's so big. She tries to apply the idea to her vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts believe resuming his courtship of Elly is why Sonny Drysdale returns. His stepfather arranges a job as a beauty product salesman and his sixth stop at the Clampetts is where his merchandise is mistaken as courting gifts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.desc: Jed thinks Granny needs help in cleaning the mansion, but she believes it's because he wants to put her in a retirement home, so Granny is ready to head to the hills with her money, which Mr. Drysdale is desperate to avoid.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: Patti needs her sales staff to pick up the pace in recruiting new millionaires; when Patti hears about Lonnie and Patrick, two millionaires who are considering joining the club, she heads off to meet them and close the deal.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The discovery of a fake painting in the Queen's art collection sends the UCOS team on a hush-hush mission to uncover the forger.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The UCOS team investigate the murder of a young peace protestor killed at the outskirts of a nuclear base in 1984 and realize that they may be in danger of exposing a Special Branch cover-up.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The members of a prestigious golf club come under suspicion when the UCOS team investigates a child murder.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: At the Great Slaughter Mangold Wurzel Festival, the fun comes to an abrupt halt when a young woman's corpse is found within the Aunt Sally dummy; Felix Livingstone has wound up in Great Slaughter rather than his intended employment at Scotland Yard.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: A TV crew has arrived to use St Vincent's Convent as a location for spy thriller; the filming becomes all too real when a live gun is fired instead of a replica; Sister Boniface deduces the bullet was meant for producer.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: After spending the night with a pipe-smoking gentleman caller, a woman is found dead with a jigsaw puzzle and a face full of cold cream.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Sister Reginald's ex-con brother Alfie abruptly turns up at the convent after being released from prison; since he has nowhere else to go, the sisters agree to let him stay.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: The body of a high-level government official's secretary is found at the bottom of a staircase and Sister Boniface claims she was dead before the fall.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: The dreamy frontman of buzzy rock 'n' roll band The Queenmakers is found dead in the dressing room, just as they are about to go on for their set; upon inspection, Sister Boniface finds a peculiar sting on the back of his neck.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: The town buzzes with excitement for the Great Slaughter Giant Marrow Contest, but a gruesome discovery is made in Edie's allotment plot before the judging can commence.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Celebrity housewife Prunella Gladwell arrives in Great Slaughter to film a feisty baking competition, and one of the contestants is about to hit her expiration date.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: When a German mayor visits Great Slaughter to partake in a war memorial ceremony, tragedy strikes; Sister Boniface investigates whether it's a terrible accident or a malicious plan.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: The Miss United contest takes a dive when one of the beauty queens is discovered dead in the pool.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Uptight inspector Richard Poole is sent to investigate the murder of an English policeman whose body was found in a locked panic room.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When the body of newlywed Lisa Moore is found in a room for which she had no key, minutes after her wedding, it's discovered that she may have been having an affair with her murderer.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC viaja a Rapid City después de que dos víctimas masculinas se descubren muertas por un ritual. Reid continúa lamentando la muerte de Maeve.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un suboficial naval revela una sorprendente conexión con la decisión del director Vance de disolver el equipo, poniendo en riesgo su futuro y la resolución del caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Tony está investigando a un marinero que podría haber saltado por la borda. Le pide a Gibbs que informe a la viuda. Pero cuando descubren que ella ha sido asesinada, todo el equipo tendrá que intervenir para descubrir qué es lo que realmente pasó.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el senador Patrick Kiley pide la ayuda de Gibbs para resolver el asesinato de un joven oficial naval, el equipo de NCIS se ve inmerso en el complicado mundo de la política de Washington.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras buscan al brutal asesino de un marine, el equipo de NCIS y Gibbs se encuentran enfrentándose nuevamente al agente del FBI Fornell.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Por la comunidad
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony intentan evitar la deportación de la activista comunitaria Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), quien no es ciudadana, y Frank debe decidir si el NYPD participará en la redada de alto perfil de los Marshals de EE. UU. contra una pandilla local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El delator
programme.desc: Mientras Frank se enfrenta a un denunciante de la policía de Nueva York que afirma tener pruebas de abuso de poder en la organización, Danny y Báez investigan el caso de una mujer que fue atropellada por un coche en circunstancias sospechosas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect makes a video call during a pursuit to apologize for relapsing. A burglar runs in circles in a vain attempt to elude Officers. A Sergeant finds a magnetic box full of meth and a hidden gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues an unruly bicyclist, a man ducks into a drive-through in an attempt to elude police, and a deputy pulls over a stolen vehicle driven by a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several units are in pursuit of a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car after he crashed into a tree. Officers intervene in domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is tased twice after a car chase. His passenger resists and is also tased. A driver refuses to exit his truck in Florida. A woman claims the pills in her purse belong to her sister.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female driving a stolen car spins out and runs from Officers in Missouri. A burglary in progress leads Officers to a suspect breaking windows at a church. An altered tag is discovered to be stolen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a series of victims are found deceased seemingly in the middle of everyday activities, the CSIs must determine what is causing them to remain upright after death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the course of an investigation, the CSIs discover that their victim, a young woman who was murdered and found with several different blood types in her system, is the daughter of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates a case involving the world of domination, Grissom pays a visit to Lady Heather to help find some answers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After a shooting involving a young boy occurs right in the middle of Koreatown, none of the witnesses will speak to the CSI team investigating the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a murder case from 12 years earlier comes to the forefront of a new CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a popular young singer is found dead outside an infamous Las Vegas nightclub, the CSI team uncovers a link between the present day crime and a murder from over 50 years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a new murder leads to a connection with an infamous serial killer, Grissom secretly joins the class of well-known criminal pathologist Dr. Raymond Langston, to gain access to the killer and get a crack in the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is shocked and saddened when, after working with Dr. Raymond Langston on the Dick & Jane murders, Grissom announces that his time as a CSI has come to an end and offers Langston a permanent position on the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The first day on the job for Dr. Langston turns from bad to worse when a simple burglary case quickly overlaps with a complicated arson and homicide case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an FBI agent who was working undercover is found brutally murdered, the CSI team is called in to assist the victim's partner in finding the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called to investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant and have quite a task ahead of them when they discover that much of the evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs are called to a murder scene at a familiar motel, Nick is thrown for a loop as he pieces together three separate murder investigations that all took place at the same establishment over the course of a year.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI está investigando un robo y un tiroteo mortal en una tienda de marihuana terapéutica.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Sara y Greg son puestos en cuarentena después de encontrarse en la escena de un crimen que está contaminado con un patógeno mortal.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI sospecha que se ha cometido un delito cuando el experimento científico de un profesor de química resulta terrible.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Morgan, Sidle y Finlay intentan de relajarse en una conferencia forense cuando ocurre un tiroteo masivo en el sitio.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La frustración se acumula para el equipo de CSI cuando aparece otra víctima y toda la evidencia apunta al asesino de Gig Harbor. Las estrellas invitadas son Mark-Paul Goselaar, Mark Valley y Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una mujer alcoholizada y drogada en la piscina de un centro de rehabilitación.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI profundiza en el morboso mundo de las “muñecas de caucho” cuando investigan el asesinato de un hombre apuñalado en un callejón.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en la cárcel del condado de Clark después de que un interno tropieza con un cuerpo mientras huye de los oficiales.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la extraña muerte de un hombre que ha sido asesinado no una, sino dos veces. Sharon Osbourne es la estrella invitada en el papel de Elise Massey, la directora del campeonato de billar.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La investigación del CSI sobre la víctima de un aparente accidente y fuga, los lleva al mundo aeronáutico.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI reabre un caso de asesinato/suicidio de 10 años de antigüedad, cuando la única sobreviviente afirma que su padre acusado era inocente.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI descubre que el principal sospechoso de los asesinatos en Gig Harbor, está siendo puesto en libertad por falta de pruebas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una convención para gente que recoge recuerdos de asesinatos macabros.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una joven víctima disfrazada de súper héroe.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young man faces life in prison – and possibly worse – unless Horatio can prove his innocence against insurmountable odds.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team race against time to find out who is trying to frame Horatio for the murder of a woman he’s been dating.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a "wives weekend" ends in murder, the CSI team is faced with three women whose separate trysts with the victim make them prime suspects

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team works in tandem with NY CSI chief Mac Taylor to apprehend a serial killer before he kills the young girl he has just taken hostage

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando alguien está decidido a destruir a Horatio y al equipo de CSI, Horatio arriesga su vida para salvar a su personal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI no se detendrá ante nada para encontrar a quién le disparó a Horatio, la evidencia los lleva a algunas de las personas más peligrosas de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la gasolina se vuelve tan cara que los residentes de Miami matan por ella, el equipo de CSI se enfrenta cara a cara con una de las redes criminales más sádicas de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la hija de la terapeuta de Delko es asesinada, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben encontrar al asesino antes de que los secretos más oscuros de Delko salgan a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un salvaje doble asesinato en los Everglades hace que Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrenten a la fuerza bruta de la propia mafia rusa de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en la boutique de moda más moderna de Miami, Horatio descubre que la inestabilidad de Julia la ha convertido en una bomba de tiempo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una grúa de 60 metros se estrella contra un rascacielos de Miami, pone en peligro a Calleigh y Delko y acaba con la esperanza de Horatio de atrapar a un famoso jefe del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Encuentran a un hombre esposado y apuñalado en su habitación de hotel, mientras que una broma en el laboratorio provoca una ruptura en el equipo de CSI y amenaza su investigación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un asesino secuestra a un inocente bebé, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben encontrarlo antes de que el niño se convierta en su próxima víctima.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un salvaje asesino anda desenfrenado en Miami, Horatio debe intervenir para evitar que un miembro de la fuerza policial se acerque demasiado al caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un tirador apunta al motel donde se aloja Delko, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar el pasado de Delko para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI, con la ayuda de informantes locales, lucha para salvar un vecindario que está a punto de ser dominado por una violenta pandilla callejera.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI usan tecnología radical para descubrir el secreto de la mente de un hombre cuando este aparece cubierto de sangre sin recordar dónde ha estado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando ocurre un asesinato durante una carrera de caballos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI descubren que Ryan tiene un vínculo personal con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Holly Golightly look-alikes rob a jewelry store the detectives find themselves questioning the girls’ involvement in the world of blood diamonds.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate the death of a vodka spokeswoman dressed as an ice queen, and murdered with her scepter at a promotional event.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial murderer leaves his victims in coded t-shirts. The team struggles to decode his mythological clues and put their main suspect behind bars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay explore the worlds of goth and glam when a young girl that belongs to the underground “suicide girls” cult is found dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a paintball player is found shot to death, Flack realizes that a dirty cop under his supervision could be to blame.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) es un profesor con una doble vida, adicto a las apuestas de mucho dinero. Al tomar dinero prestado de unos gánsteres muy peligrosos, pone en peligro la vida de sus seres queridos y debe jugarse a todo o nada.

programme.title: El espectáculo más grande del mundo
programme.desc: Charlton Heston interpreta a Brad Braden, un director de circo que vive para mantener su espectáculo. Cuando el "Big Top" está por tocar fondo, Braden contrata al Gran Sebastian, un osado trapecista, para revitalizar el circo.

programme.title: Buena Vista Social Club
programme.desc: Aging Cuban musicians whose talents had been virtually forgotten following Castro's takeover of Cuba, are brought out of retirement by Ry Cooder, who travelled to Havana in order to bring the musicians together.

programme.title: Inside Llewyn Davis (en español)
programme.desc: Inside Llewyn Davis sigue a un joven cantante de folk mientras recorre la escena folk de Greenwich Village en 1961. Llewyn Davis (Oscar Isaac) lucha por triunfar contra obstáculos aparentemente insuperables, algunos de ellos creados por él mismo.

programme.title: Fuimos héroes
programme.desc: En 1965, Estados Unidos está en guerra con Vietnam del Norte, y el teniente coronel Hal Moore prepara a sus tropas para una de las batallas más violentas de la historia de EE. UU.: “El valle de la muerte”.

programme.title: El señor de la guerra
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, ganador de un Oscar®, protagoniza esta historia tensa y llena de acción sobre un famoso traficante de armas que vendió armas a dictadores y consiguió eludir la ley durante casi veinte años.

programme.title: Una vida mejor
programme.desc: Carlos Galindo, un jardinero mexicano en California, lucha por alejar a su hijo Luis de las pandillas. Tras el robo de su camioneta, la logran recuperar, pero la policía descubre que es indocumentado, poniendo en riesgo su futuro y su relación.

programme.title: Frontera hostil
programme.desc: Luego de ser deportada, Claudia debe elegir entre reconciliarse con su padre, de quien está distanciada, o juntarse con un peligroso contrabandista para poder volver a Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Perro salvaje
programme.desc: Una historia desarrollada en Indochina en 1959. Una tierra más allá de las reglas, una época despiadada y el nacimiento de una legenda.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Misión imposible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise), un agente secreto, es incriminado por la muerte de su compañero de espionaje e intenta deshacerse de los asesinos del gobierno que lo persiguen. Corre contra el reloj mientras intenta descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: Misión imposible 2
programme.desc: El espía más grande del mundo, Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise), regresa junto con la hermosa Nyah Hall para detener al agente renegado Sean Ambrose, antes de que este libere un nuevo tipo de terror en un mundo desprevenido.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: el contraataque
programme.desc: "Los héroes americanos más grandes" están de regreso y han sido culpados de un crimen atroz que no cometieron. Roadblock (Dwayne Johnson) dirige a un nuevo equipo en esta explosiva aventura.

programme.title: Los locos Addams II
programme.desc: El futuro de la familia se torna incierto cuando la malvada niñera se casa con Lucas mientras los niños están embarcados en un campamento de verano. Pero Merlina tiene aún una o dos cartas bajo la manga…

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: Una auténtica historia del mundo de las carreras en el momento de la depresión, cuyas victorias animaron no solo a los espíritus del equipo que los apoyaba, sino también a toda una nación.

programme.title: Exploradores
programme.desc: En su laboratorio improvisado, tres niños hacen uso de su ingenio y un descubrimiento sorprendente para construir una nave espacial y emprender un increíble viaje interplanetario.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: La familia Addams
programme.desc: Ven y únete a La Familia Addams ¡para el festival del terror más hilarante de la temporada o de cualquier otra

programme.title: Los locos Addams II
programme.desc: El futuro de la familia se torna incierto cuando la malvada niñera se casa con Lucas mientras los niños están embarcados en un campamento de verano. Pero Merlina tiene aún una o dos cartas bajo la manga…

programme.title: Bienvenidos al ayer
programme.desc: Cuando cinco adolescentes descubren una máquina que puede enviarlos al pasado, las posibilidades parecen ser infinitas. Pero al cambiar el pasado, amenazaron el futuro del mundo. ¿Podrán deshacer el daño causado antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: Un película de miedo 3
programme.desc: David Zucker dirige Scary Movie 3, una película llena de actuaciones especiales divertidas e innecesarias, que se burla de las películas de terror, los éxitos de taquilla, y de la cultura popular.

programme.title: Pelea de chicas
programme.desc: Cuando Anna Wyncomb conoce un club de lucha clandestino exclusivamente femenino para cambiar el caos de su vida, descubre que está mucho más conectada personalmente con la historia del club de lo que jamás podría imaginar.

programme.title: El gran Pee-Wee
programme.desc: Pee-Wee Herman es un simple granjero en un pueblito. Pero pronto una gran tormenta arrasa con todo. Y llega un circo a la granja de Pee Wee quien los deja quedarse un tiempo. El circo decide poner un espectáculo con una estrella adorable, ¡Pee-Wee!

programme.title: No es otra tonta película de comida
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds, Anna Ferris, y Justin Long son unos jóvenes que trabajan de meseros mientras buscan el significado de la vida, el amor, y la amistad, en esta divertida comedia.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood
programme.desc: Las papas queman en esta comedia-acción de ritmo veloz, con la actuación estelar de Eddie Murphy como Axel Foley, un listo policía de las calles de Detroit, que rastrea al asesino de su mejor amigo en Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood II
programme.desc: Axel Foley regresa a Beverly Hills para ayudar a Taggart y Rosewood a investigar el tiroteo casi mortal del jefe Bogomil y la serie de "crímenes del alfabeto" asociados a él. Protagonizada por Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood III
programme.desc: Axel Foley (Eddie Murphy), que investiga una red de robo de coches, se encuentra con algo mucho más grande que eso: los mismos hombres que mataron a su jefe llevan una red de blanqueo de dinero en un parque temático de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood
programme.desc: Las papas queman en esta comedia-acción de ritmo veloz, con la actuación estelar de Eddie Murphy como Axel Foley, un listo policía de las calles de Detroit, que rastrea al asesino de su mejor amigo en Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba a ladrón
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: La distancia mas larga
programme.desc: El destino vincula irremediablemente a una abuela y su nieto. Aunque no se conocen forman parte de un círculo que no pueden romper. Las segundas oportunidades aparecen, pero la libertad individual se impone.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Operación Overlord
programme.desc: Nada puede prepararte para el caos alucinante de Operación Overlord. El mega productor J.J. Abrams crea un emocionante viaje retorcido sobre un equipo de tropas estadounidenses que se encuentran cara a cara con los súper soldados nazis nunca vistos.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.desc: Gene Autry heads North to apprehend fur smugglers plundering the trappers' pelts, and then return to the U.S. When the trail leads to the H-H dude ranch owned by a beautiful gal, the action heats up.

programme.desc: Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich and Charles Laughton star in this exceptional courtroom Drama about a young man on trial for a wealthy widow's murder after he suspiciously profits from her will.

programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.desc: A TV hypnotist picks Robbie out of the audience to participate, but back at home Bub ends up hypnotized instead.

programme.desc: A broken marriage gives Mike and Sally a lot to think about.

programme.desc: While Bub is in Ireland, Steve realizes how much work it takes to run a household. Meanwhile, Chip has a female friend over for dinner.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: After Bub decides to stay in Ireland, the Douglas family misses him sorely until Bub's brother Charley arrives for a visit.

programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.desc: Don't count chickens before they hatch! Oliver thinks he's laid a gold egg of an idea when he decides to dive beak first into the business of raising chickens. Lisa, on the other hand, sees little difference between raising chickens and children.

programme.desc: Oliver Wendell Douglas returns from farm to firm... law firm, that is. When a young and ambitious local graduates from law school, he looks for a potential partner in Hooterville. Oliver is the logical choice. Lisa and Eb help the new venture.

programme.desc: After partnering with a young, local lawyer, Oliver has opened a new law office in Hooterville. However, their secretary, Lisa, shows a lack of necessary skills. Soon, Lisa's job is on the line, even if she is married to one of the partners.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: While Lisa and Oliver consider what to do on their unplanned trip to Washington D.C., Mr. Haney rents their house to a family of eight. Meanwhile in the nation's capital, Lisa and Eb tour the White House, and Mr. Kimball makes official trouble.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: March 1984. Jack Kennedy discovers his daughters brutally murdered. Their mother and niece spend their lives keeping the case alive. DNA leads nowhere. 30 years later, an informant gives up a name.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: New DNA technology and the national DNA databank help police hunt down a rapist-killer 11 years after he committed his crimes, and a detective's painstaking recreation of a woman's shooting death proves it wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts--and three other cold case murders--leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July 1997, the brutal murder of 19-year-old Tiffany Johnston rocks the small town of Bethany, Oklahoma. DNA points to her killer over a decade later and leads investigators across state lines.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Guns found dumped in a pond help police to solve the 15-year-old murder of Detroit cab company owner. And the rape and murder of an Atlanta TV station receptionist goes cold for 20 years before DNA links a man to the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In the heart of Cajun country, young mother Brenda DuPont is found murdered in her home in May 1988. The initial investigation sputters and turns cold, but her sister Linda vows to solve her murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After 19 years, Kansas detectives reopen the case of a banker found beaten to death in his bed--and the chief suspect is his cheating wife. And a man with a guilty conscience helps Arkansas police to crack a cold case of murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Bill Kurtis examines one of the most infamous cold cases in Los Angeles history.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Looks at how law enforcers stick with cases for many years, using fresh evidence to win convictions or to free prisoners who were wrongfully jailed. We examine the unsolved murder of Hogan's Heroes star Bob Crane.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In June 1985, a 20-year-old "Sucker Day" Festival Queen is found brutalized. The small community of Nixa, Missouri, is certain her blood is on the hands of a local wealthy businessman, but after 25 years DNA reveals the true killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In 1983, Navy seamen Sonny Grotton left base for a long weekend at home. But as he pulled into his driveway, a gunman killed him. And in 1993, former state trooper Doug Wright claimed his estranged wife shot and killed herself in their home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When Sherry Leighty goes missing in 1999, her family is left wondering how a dedicated mother of three could vanish without a trace. A decade later, the cold case heats up when Sherry's sister launches a social media campaign.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: 13 days after Pam Pitts disappears in 1988 her charred body is found at a popular hangout spot in the Arizona desert. When a second victim is discovered in a mineshaft, detectives suspect the killer may have known them both.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After the murder of her aunt goes cold, a woman helps launch an advocate group that brings awareness to cases that have gone unsolved.

programme.title: Drunk History

programme.title: Drunk History

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Uno para llevar
programme.desc: Una pareja casada decidió escapar del frío del invierno con unas minivacaciones en Key West.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 11 años desapareció de un pequeño pueblo en un área remota de Alaska, los investigadores se preguntaron si había sido atacada por un oso o se había perdido en los densos bosques.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo de Gran Bretaña, un granjero se encuentra con una apariencia escalofriante. Empalado en el poste de la cerca hay una cabeza de cordero cortada y una nota que dice: Usted es el próximo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, cuando Steven Fortin ataca a la Oficial de Policía Estatal de Maine fuera de su hora servicio, Vicky Gardner, durante una parada rutinaria, se desencadena una serie de eventos que reinician de golpe un caso de asesinato estancado en New Jersey.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En algún momento durante una fiesta de Navidad en el vecindario, Melissa Brannen, de cinco años, desapareció. Los investigadores recurrieron a la ciencia forense para ayudarlos a ver lo que se perdieron los testigos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer fue brutalmente asesinada en su casa y los únicos testigos del crimen fueron los perros de la familia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un residente que hacía tiempo vivía en el pequeño pueblo de Lefroy, Tasmania, fue asesinado fuera de su hogar. El robo pareció ser el motivo, pero sin sospechosos, la investigación se detiene.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, cuando la adolescente Tara Munsey desapareció al salir de su trabajo en un restaurante de Virginia, no se sabe si se escapó o si fue víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of `Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.desc: Two Jack Russell terriers, Ruby and Jinx, show how dogs communicate through energy and body language.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff and Dex meet with Roger Grimes' wife and learn he has a son; Sable is pregnant and unable to tell Dex that he is the father; Adam has a picture of Jeff and Monica retouched to appear incestuous and then submits it to a sleazy tabloid.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Charles Matthews tells Blake a grim secret; Zorelli finds a bug hidden in his apartment; Alexis tells Monica that Jason Colby isn't her father; Alexis learns she has a Fredrick Stahl original and realizes Blake's deep, dark secret.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis threatens to sue Blake for half of the plundered Nazzi treasure unless Sable withdraws her lawsuits against Colbyco. Sable agrees; Krystina leads Fallon to the treasure. They are followed by Dennis Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Krystle Grant Jennings prepares to marry wealthy oil tycoon Blake Carrington, Matthew Blaisdel, a former lover, returns to town and causes her second thoughts.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's estranged son Steven returns home for the ceremony, as does rebellious daughter Fallon, who objects to the union. Blake and Krystle reconcile; Matthew is reunited with his wife and daughter; Walter's rig is sabotaged.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Krystle are married; Jeff Colby pursues a disinterested Fallon; Walter and Matthew form a business partnership; Claudia and Lindsay try without success to resolve their differences.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Urgent business cuts short Blake and Krystle's honeymoon; Steven takes a job working for Matthew Blaisdel; Cecil proposes that Fallon marry his nephew.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake invites Matthew to dinner at the mansion to entice him to return to Denver-Carrington; Krystle clashes with head butler, Joseph; Matthew tells Krystle he's still in love with her; Jeff attempts to win Fallon.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven's ex-lover, Ted, arrives from New York; Fallon reluctantly marries Jeff Colby; Blake hires Michael, the chauffeur, to do undercover work for Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven is taunted on the job for being gay; Blake learns of the terms of Fallon's marriage to Jeff; Steven finds himself attracted to Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Walter takes Steven to a bordello; Steven is blamed for sabotaging Matthew's rig; Krystle pawns her diamonds to help Matthew financially.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: After being fired for sabotaging Matthew's equipment, an innocent Steven learns he was set up; Lindsay is shattered to learn about her birth; Blake tries to learn who bankrolled Matthew; Fallon warns Steven's ex-lover to stay away from her brother.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Matthew and Walter's well comes in; Fallon asks to borrow the necklace Krystle pawned to help Matthew; at his mountain cabin, Steven and Claudia make love.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven announces he is moving out of the mansion; the chauffeur, Michael, tells Blake of Steven's affair with Claudia; Fallon resumes relations with Michael, until Blake has the chauffeur worked over; Lindsay sees her mother with Steven.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
